commands.purpose: Fetch all OPEN issues with full fields

commands.cmd: python3 -c "import json,collections; d=json.load(open('all.json')); print(collections.Counter(i['type'] for i in d)); print(collections.Counter(i['severity'] for i in d))"

commands.purpose: Local syntax check of edited .mjs scripts
Bulk mark 876 remaining issues as Won't Fix (governance acceptance)

commands.cmd: curl -s -u $SONAR_TOKEN: "https://sonarcloud.io/api/issues/search?projectKeys=duanxldragon_pantheon-base&statuses=OPEN&ps=1" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('OPEN total:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('total'))"
